rationale.R1.2: The plurality-aggregation argument and the claim that disagreeing intervals 'can be safely averaged' are load-bearing logical steps that a general review might interrogate, but this is not confirmed by the delegation.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact is dense with specific empirical figures (6.4% revenue gain, 11.2% CVaR reduction, <0.4% degradation increase, K-saturation near 128); a technical look would scrutinise their evidential grounding.
rationale.R1.4: The 'first aggregator-scale dispatch method' claim is a falsifiable novelty assertion; a scientific look naturally includes assessing this against Bertsimas-Sim and scenario-tree literature.
rationale.R1.6: A casual 'take a look' can plausibly mean prose review alone, in which case R1.6 would be the sole load-bearing dimension.
